2026-0251
2026-03-25ESDCAccessible Canada ActReappointment of a director of the Canadian Accessibility Standards Development OrganizationReappointment of Joseph Robert McLaughlin of Surrey, British Columbia, as a director of the Canadian Accessibility Standards Development Organization, to hold office during pleasure for a term of three years, effective May 3, 2026.N/A
subject: Reappointment of a director of the Canadian Accessibility Standards Development Organization
precis: Reappointment of Joseph Robert McLaughlin of Surrey, British Columbia, as a director of the Canadian Accessibility Standards Development Organization, to hold office during pleasure for a term of three years, effective May 3, 2026.
